data.content: Implementation review approved. Gate knot type fully implemented: GateData schema with owner_kind and failure_modes, gate workflow states (ready_to_evaluate, evaluating, shipped, abandoned), evaluate_gate() with invariant-based reopen logic, CLI surface (kno new --type gate, kno gate evaluate), workflow_runtime generalization, DB migration v9, sync/rehydrate support, evaluating skill prompt, and comprehensive test coverage. make sanity passes at 95.04% coverage. No specification drift, security issues, or regressions found.
